column1: # Ticketed pre-existing violations awaiting GitHub Support removal.
# Owner decision (Cade Spivey, 2026-07-13): releases may proceed while Support
# deletes these hidden pull-request refs; the exposure is unchanged by releasing
# and every release artifact is independently verified font-free. Support ticket
# filed 2026-07-13 requesting deletion of refs/pull/39-50 and garbage collection.
# DELETE THIS FILE once Support confirms removal; the audit then requires a
# fully clean advertisement again. Only refs/pull/N/head entries are honored.
